raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Et tee Israëta Wihri
bij eekſch Mizpas ſweh-
rejscht/ fazzidami : Ne
weenam no muuns buhs ſawu
Meitu teem Benjamitexeem par
Seeiwu doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze tee Laudis us
ta STIPRA DEEWA
Naminu / uu palikke tur lihds
Wakkaram preekſch Deewa / un
pazehle ſawas Balkfnes/ un rau-
daja gauschi randadami /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fazzija : Ak KUNGS
tu Israëta Deews ! kapelz irr tas
notizzis eekſch Israëta / ka ſcho-
deen Israëls par weenu Zilti irr
masaks ktuus?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ohtrâ Deena zeblahs tee
Laudis agri/ un uſtaisija tur
weenu Altari / un uppureja De-
dsamus·Uppurus/un Pateikſcha-
nae·Uppurus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Israëta Behrni fazzija:
Ras tur irr/ kas wehl ne irr aug-
scham nahzis eekſch tahs Drau-
des no wiſſahn Israëta Ziltim
pee ta KUNGA? jo tur tee fohti
apſivehrejschees pahr to / kas ne
buhtu us augſchu pee ta KUN-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Israëta Behrneem bij
ſchehl pahr Benjaminu winn-
Brahli/ un tee fazzija : Schodee-
ter weena Zilts no Israëta at-
rauta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ko darrisun mehs teem/ ka
tee Atlikkuschee Seewas dabbu
jo mehs effan pee ta KUNG-
sivehrejschi/kauehs teem no muh-
tu Meitahm ne weenu par See-
wahin doht gribbam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija : Irrag kas
no Israëta Ziltim/ kas ne irr ue
augſchu nahzis pee ta KUNG-
us Mizpu ? un reds no Jabe-
eekſch Gileadas ne bia ne weene
Lehgeri nahzis pee tahs Draudses.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Laudis tappe ſkaiti-
ti/ un redsi/ tur ne bia ne weens
no teem kas Jabeſa eekſch Gilea-
das dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija ta Draudse-
us turren diwipadesmits tuhfsto-
tchus Wihrus no teem ſtſpra-
keem/ un pawehleja teem / faazzi-
dami: Eita/ un kanjeet tohs/ kas
Jabeſa eekſch Gileadas dſihwo ar
Sohbina Atmini / lihds ar See-
wahin un Behrnieem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ſchi irr ta Leeta/ ko-
jums buhs darriht / wiſſus no
Wihra-Kahrtas/ un wiſſas See-
was/ kas pee Wihra gullejschas/
buhs jums iſdeldeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee atradde ſtarp teem
Eedſihwotajeem no Jabeſa eekſch
Gileadas tschetrfunts Meitas/
kas Junpraiwas bia/ kas Wihru
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
